name: UI Discrepancy for Security Feature
description: The user interface does not correctly enable or configure a security feature, but provides feedback that causes the user to believe the feature is in a secure state. This can lead users to operate under a false sense of security while protections are actually inactive.
detection_pattern: EGRESS node (UI output) displays security state information that is inconsistent with the actual CONTROL or AUTH node configuration. Look for a STRUCTURAL UI component that reports a security feature as enabled without a corresponding CONTROL node that enforces the feature, missing a TRANSFORM that synchronizes UI state with actual security state.
